objectives: Update CHANGELOG.md from stub to comprehensive 0.1.0 release entry
Create .github/workflows/release.yml for crates.io publish + GitHub Release
Harden .github/workflows/ci.yml with bench-check and examples-check jobs
constraints: cargo check/test/clippy must pass before commit
cargo fmt pre-existing failures in example files are not caused by these changes
Only modify CHANGELOG.md, release.yml, ci.yml — no Rust source changes
important_facts: Workspace has 7 crates: mx20022 (umbrella), mx20022-model, mx20022-parse, mx20022-validate, mx20022-translate, mx20022-codegen, mx20022-cli
Release publish order: model -> codegen -> parse -> validate -> translate -> cli -> mx20022 (umbrella)
cargo fmt fails on example files due to nightly-only rustfmt.toml options (imports_granularity, group_imports) — pre-existing, not caused by this iteration
CI uses .github/workflows/ci.yml which is reused by release.yml via `uses: ./.github/workflows/ci.yml`
release.yml requires `crates-io` GitHub environment with CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN secret
decisions_made: Coverage job kept as commented block inside jobs section with proper indentation — not activated until test suite is more mature
bench-check and examples-check both gated on `needs: check` to run in parallel with test/clippy/docs
30-second sleep between each crates.io publish step to allow index propagation
Changelog uses MT<->MX arrows (ASCII) instead of Unicode arrows for portability
Added [Unreleased] comparison link and [0.1.0] release tag link at bottom of CHANGELOG
dependencies: GitHub environment `crates-io` must be configured with CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN secret before release workflow can publish
risks_issues: cargo fmt check fails on example files due to nightly-only rustfmt options: pre-existing, not introduced here — CI fmt job runs on stable so it may fail there too

iteration.summary: Completed all three deliverables for iteration 12 release polish. CHANGELOG.md was replaced from a 3-line stub to a comprehensive entry documenting all 7 crates and their features across iterations 1-12. Created release.yml workflow that reuses ci.yml via workflow_call, publishes 7 crates to crates.io in dependency order with index propagation sleeps, then creates a GitHub Release with changelog-extracted notes. Hardened ci.yml by adding bench-check and examples-check compile-only jobs gated on the check job, plus a commented-out coverage block ready to activate. All quality gates passed except cargo fmt which has pre-existing failures in example Rust files unrelated to these changes.
next_actions: Configure `crates-io` GitHub environment with CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN secret
Fix pre-existing cargo fmt failures in example files (use stable-compatible rustfmt settings or apply fmt with nightly)
Tag v0.1.0 to trigger the release workflow once all crates are ready for publish
